introSection: Gold Mini Coaster was a steel kiddie indoor roller coaster currently located at Tooty Town in Al-Hofuf, Eastern Province, Saudi Arabia.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a chain of minecarts.

fullText:
Gold Mini Coaster was a steel kiddie indoor roller coaster currently located at Tooty Town in Al-Hofuf, Eastern Province, Saudi Arabia.



Yellow track and sand supports.

The train is designed to resemble a chain of minecarts.
